name: Man
desc: The standard representation of a man, universally used to denote 'Dad' in text and social media. Perfect for Father's Day tributes and family-centric content.

name: Person: Beard
desc: A popular icon for the modern bearded father. Ideal for SEO content related to men's grooming, masculine style, and hipster dad culture.

name: Man Feeding Baby
desc: A powerful symbol of modern fatherhood and caregiving. Represents new dads, parental leave, and the nurturing side of being a father.

name: Family: Man, Girl
desc: Captures the special bond between a father and his daughter. Essential for sentimental posts about 'girl dads' and family milestones.

name: Family: Man, Boy
desc: Represents the relationship between a father and his son. Great for content about mentorship, legacy, and shared masculine hobbies.

name: Family: Man, Girl, Boy
desc: A comprehensive family icon showing a father with both a son and a daughter, symbolizing balanced parenting and full house joy.

name: Family: Man, Man, Girl
desc: An inclusive emoji representing families with two fathers. High SEO value for diverse parenting and LGBTQ+ family content.

name: Old Man
desc: Represents the patriarch of the family, including grandfathers and elderly fathers. Used for wisdom, heritage, and aging-related family posts.

name: Necktie
desc: The classic symbol for the professional 'working dad.' Often used in Father's Day graphics and content about career-focused fathers.

name: Hammer and Wrench
desc: Dedicated to the 'Fix-it Dad.' Perfect for targeting keywords like DIY, home repair, and Father's Day tool gift guides.

name: Cut of Meat
desc: Symbolizes the backyard barbecue culture. Ideal for SEO related to grilling, summer cookouts, and 'king of the grill' dad tropes.

name: Flag in Hole
desc: The quintessential hobby emoji for dads who love the green. Great for marketing golf gear and weekend leisure activities.

name: Fishing Pole
desc: Represents the traditional father-child bonding activity of fishing. Evokes feelings of tranquility, nature, and weekend getaways.

name: Trophy
desc: Commonly paired with dad emojis to signify the 'World's Best Dad.' Used for awards, Father's Day contests, and high-praise tributes.

name: Flexed Biceps
desc: Symbolizes the strength and protection provided by a father figure. Often used to describe 'Hero Dads' and physical fitness.

name: Sunglasses
desc: The icon for the 'Cool Dad.' Represents a relaxed, stylish, and fun-loving fatherhood style, popular in lifestyle and fashion blogs.

name: Running Shoe
desc: A nod to the 'dad shoe' fashion trend and active fathers. Targets keywords like fitness, comfort, and practical footwear.

name: Video Game
desc: Perfect for the modern, tech-savvy father. Represents shared gaming time with kids and the 'Gamer Dad' community.

name: Beer Mug
desc: A symbol for relaxation and celebratory drinks. Often used for Father's Day cheers and weekend relaxation content.

name: House
desc: Represents the home and the father as a provider and pillar of the household. Core to real estate and family safety content.
